prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-UT72BBC8MMD-5X4-WHT Product Type: CRAFT_BEAD Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: Universal Tool 72 Beads Bead Counter 8mm Diameter Description: Sort your beads easily with the 72 8mm Bead Counter.

This bead counter is designed to count up to 72 beads. The diameter of each bead slot is 8mm, and the rows are 8 by 9. The counter even has a nifty hanging hole for easy storage when not in use. Make sure to grab this counter before your next jewelry making project. Search Terms: bead counter jewelry making sorter crafting supplies containers Features: - Bead Counter: Counts 72 Beads - Diameter of Bead Slot: 8mm - 8 by 9 Rows - Hanging Hole for Easy Storage - Color: White === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.title_differentiation: Counts 72 Beads, 8Mm Diameter Slots, 8X9 Rows, Hanging Hole Storage, Jewelry Making Organizer

openai.title_differentiation: Counts 72 Beads, 8Mm Slots, 8 By 9 Rows, Hanging Hole, Jewelry Making Sorter, White Craft Supplies Organizer
